# Elements

<!-- GENERATED by tools/gen-docs.js from the js/ source tables. Do not edit by hand. -->

Everything in CINDER is one of these elements moving under a handful of
physical rules and reacting with its neighbors. This page is the full
reference; see the [Player Guide](player-guide.md) for how to use them.

## Movement archetypes

| Archetype | Behavior |
| --- | --- |
| Static | Fixed in place (walls, stone, wood, glass, metal). |
| Powder | Falls and piles into slopes (sand, snow, ash, seeds). |
| Liquid | Falls and spreads to find its level (water, oil, lava, acid). |
| Gas | Rises, wanders, and dissipates (smoke, steam, hydrogen, sparks). |
| Fire | Flickers, ignites fuel, dies to smoke or ash. |
| Fauna | Living cells: crawl/fly, feed, breed, and starve. |

## Element reference

| Element | Archetype | Density | Flammable | Lifetime | Notes |
| --- | --- | ---: | :---: | :---: | --- |
| Wall | Static | 100 | — | — | — |
| Stone | Static | 100 | — | — | dissolves in acid |
| Sand | Powder | 60 | — | — | dissolves in acid |
| Water | Liquid | 30 | — | — | — |
| Oil | Liquid | 20 | 25% | — | dissolves in acid; burns for 140 |
| Wood | Static | 100 | 1.5% | — | dissolves in acid; burns for 420 |
| Plant | Static | 100 | 12% | — | dissolves in acid; burns for 90 |
| Fire | Fire | 1 | — | 30–90 | — |
| Smoke | Gas | 1 | — | 60–180 | — |
| Steam | Gas | 1 | — | 80–200 | — |
| Acid | Liquid | 32 | — | — | — |
| Lava | Liquid | 40 | — | — | — |
| Gunpowder | Powder | 55 | 60% | — | dissolves in acid; explosive; burns for 60 |
| Ice | Static | 100 | — | — | dissolves in acid |
| Electric | Gas | 1 | — | 6–16 | — |
| Live Water | Liquid | 30 | — | 40–70 | — |
| Seed | Powder | 25 | 25% | — | dissolves in acid; burns for 30 |
| Ash | Powder | 40 | — | — | dissolves in acid |
| Bug | Fauna | 45 | 30% | 240–320 | dissolves in acid; burns for 40 |
| Snow | Powder | 20 | — | — | dissolves in acid |
| Metal | Static | 100 | — | — | dissolves in acid |
| Glass | Static | 100 | — | — | — |
| Hydrogen | Gas | 1 | 90% | — | burns for 8 |
| Hunter | Fauna | 45 | 30% | 300–400 | dissolves in acid; burns for 40 |
| Fungus | Static | 100 | 8% | — | dissolves in acid; burns for 70 |
| Fish | Fauna | 35 | — | 300–380 | dissolves in acid |
| Moth | Fauna | 20 | 45% | 500–700 | dissolves in acid; burns for 25 |
| Molten | Liquid | 48 | — | — | — |

## Reactions

When two elements sit next to each other, they may transform. Chance is
per adjacency check; temperature gates growth reactions (see the
[temperature field](architecture.md#temperature)).

| Reaction | Becomes | Chance | Temp |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| Acid + Metal | Acid + Hydrogen | 3% | — |
| Acid + Water | Water + Water | 1% | — |
| Ash + Water | Plant | 0.4% | ≥ 5° |
| Electric + Water | Live Water | 100% | — |
| Fire + Water | Smoke + Water | 90% | — |
| Fungus + Wood | Fungus + Fungus | 0.06% | — |
| Gunpowder + Water | Ash + Water | 2% | — |
| Hydrogen + Fire | Steam + Fire | 40% | — |
| Ice + Fire | Water + Fire | 15% | — |
| Ice + Lava | Water + Lava | 50% | — |
| Lava + Metal | Lava + Molten | 0.01% | — |
| Lava + Sand | Lava + Glass | 8% | — |
| Lava + Water | Stone + Steam | 80% | — |
| Live Water + Live Water | Hydrogen + Live Water | 0.08% | — |
| Metal + Acid | Hydrogen + Acid | 3% | — |
| Metal + Lava | Molten + Lava | 0.01% | — |
| Metal + Molten | Molten + Molten | 0.01% | — |
| Molten + Metal | Molten + Molten | 0.01% | — |
| Molten + Water | Metal + Steam | 80% | — |
| Oil + Electric | Fire | 40% | — |
| Plant + Fire | Steam + Fire | 4% | — |
| Sand + Lava | Glass + Lava | 8% | — |
| Seed + Water | Plant | 1% | ≥ 5° |
| Snow + Fire | Water + Fire | 50% | — |
| Snow + Lava | Steam + Lava | 60% | — |
| Snow + Water | Water + Water | 5% | — |
| Steam + Ice | Water + Ice | 10% | — |
| Water + Ash | Plant | 0.4% | ≥ 5° |
| Water + Electric | Live Water | 100% | — |
| Water + Fire | Steam + Smoke | 40% | — |
| Water + Gunpowder | Water + Ash | 2% | — |
| Water + Ice | Ice + Ice | 0.2% | — |
| Water + Lava | Steam + Stone | 80% | — |
| Water + Molten | Steam + Metal | 80% | — |
| Water + Plant | Plant + Plant | 2% | ≥ 5° |
| Water + Seed | Plant | 1% | ≥ 5° |
| Wood + Fungus | Fungus + Fungus | 0.06% | — |

**Acid dissolves** (4% each, consuming the acid ~25% of the time): Ash, Bug, Fish, Fungus, Gunpowder, Hunter, Ice, Moth, Oil, Plant, Sand, Seed, Snow, Stone, Wood. Glass is the exception — acid-proof.
